cards.back: Electronic waste, a waste stream generated from discarded electronic devices, including computers, smartphones, televisions, and other electronic equipment
Electronic resource, a digital document, image, audio, or video that has been digitized and made available online for access and use
Inequality in access to information technology, including computers, smartphones, and internet connectivity, particularly in rural or disadvantaged areas
The process of collecting, sorting, treating, and disposing of electronic waste in an environmentally responsible manner
An electronic device or material that can be recovered and reused to produce new products, reducing waste and conserving natural resources
